backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the PROXIIS backend with task management, user/task profiles, leaderboard, and access-controlled CRUD operations for tasks and profiles on the Internet Computer.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that HubView.tsx was updated to replace the 'Connection is still initializing' message with 'Make an account first to post the task in proxies.' when the user is unauthenticated.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key behaviors of each component, view, hook, and utility.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens (colors, radius, chart, sidebar) used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the PROXIIS Vite app, loading Google Sign-In, QRCode.js scripts, and mounting the React app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing top-level view state (landing/hub/profile), rendering a neon grid background, and including the Sonner toast provider.
frontend/src/components/CategorySelector: Horizontally scrollable category filter pill bar with toggle behavior and a green-to-purple gradient for the active selection, plus an 'All' pill to clear the filter.
frontend/src/components/CompleteTaskModa: Dialog modal allowing task performers to upload a completion photo and task creators to verify and star-rate the completed task.
frontend/src/components/FilterBar.tsx: Horizontally scrollable sort filter bar with toggleable 'Newest', 'Most Urgent', and 'Highest Paying' buttons styled with a green-to-purple gradient when active.
frontend/src/components/HubTopBar.tsx: Top navigation bar for the hub view featuring the PROXIIS logo, a toggleable search input, a notifications popover, a leaderboard sheet, and a profile button.
frontend/src/components/LeaderboardPanel: Displays the top 10 users ranked by earnings, tasks completed, and average rating, with loading skeletons and an empty state.
frontend/src/components/PostTaskModal.ts: Modal form for creating a new task, handling photo upload with progress tracking, form state, and submission via the useCreateTask hook.
frontend/src/components/QRCodeDisplay.ts: Renders a UPI payment QR code using a CDN-loaded QRCode library, generated from a UPI deep link based on the task price with a 10% platform fee.
frontend/src/components/StarRating.tsx: Presentational component that renders a row of filled, half-filled, or empty star icons based on a numeric rating value.
frontend/src/components/TaskCard.tsx: Card component displaying a task's photo, category badge, title, location, deadline, and price, opening a TaskDetailsSheet on click with an auth/profile guard.
frontend/src/components/TaskDetailsSheet: Side sheet showing full task details with actions for accepting (with UPI payment), toggling Telegram chat, completing, and deleting a task based on the user's role.
frontend/src/components/WeeklyProgressRe: Auto-scrolling reel that continuously loops through a hardcoded list of recently completed task descriptions to show weekly activity.
frontend/src/config/constants.ts: Exports a placeholder UPI_ID constant used for payment processing throughout the app.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGoogleAuth.ts: Custom hook that loads the Google Identity Services SDK, initializes Google Sign-In, and exposes signIn/signOut functions along with decoded user info from the JWT credential.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient login/logout state and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useLeaderboard.ts: React Query hook that fetches the leaderboard (array of Profiles) from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useProfile.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profiles, including getting the caller's profile, creating a Google-linked profile, and saving profile updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useTaskActions.ts: Collection of mutation hooks for task lifecycle actions: assigning a performer, completing, verifying, toggling Telegram discussion, and deleting tasks.
frontend/src/hooks/useTasks.ts: React Query hooks for fetching all tasks, searching tasks, retrieving a user's post history, and creating new tasks via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining OKLCH-based design tokens (colors, radius) for a dark-mode-only theme with green/purple/teal accents.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/utils/deepLinks.ts: Utility functions for building Telegram and UPI deep links, applying a 10% platform fee to UPI payment amounts.
frontend/src/utils/time.ts: Utility functions for converting between datetime-local input strings and bigint nanosecond timestamps, plus a human-readable deadline formatter.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/src/views/HubView.tsx: Main task hub view that displays, filters, and sorts tasks by category/search/sort criteria, and handles task posting with authentication and profile checks.
frontend/src/views/LandingView.tsx: Landing page view for Proxiis showing a hero section, 'How it Works' steps, and a 'Get Started' button that navigates to the hub.
frontend/src/views/ProfileView.tsx: Profile view handling Internet Identity login, Google Sign-In, user profile creation/editing, and displaying the user's post history and ratings.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based colors, border radii, fonts, shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking existing features, pending fix requests, and architectural notes for the Proxiis campus task-posting app.
